name: eda-module

metadata.name: eda-module
metadata.summary: A reusable EDA module for exploratory data analysis

documentation:
# EDA Module

A reusable module for performing exploratory data analysis (EDA) in Python.

## Features
- Load and describe datasets.
- Check for missing values and duplicates.
- Perform univariate and bivariate analysis.
- Visualize correlations and outliers.

## Installation
```bash
pip install eda_module

## Usage

import eda_module as eda

df = eda.load_data("path/to/dataset.csv")
eda.data_overview(df)
eda.check_missing_values(df)

functions.name: eda_module.eda.load_data
documentation: Load a dataset from a CSV file.

functions.name: eda_module.eda.data_overview
documentation: Print basic details about the dataset.

functions.name: eda_module.eda.check_missing_values
documentation: Check for missing values in the dataset.

functions.name: eda_module.eda.data_types_and_uniques
documentation: Check data types and number of unique values.

functions.name: eda_module.eda.handle_duplicates
documentation: Drop duplicate rows and display the number of duplicates.

functions.name: eda_module.eda.univariate_analysis
documentation: Perform univariate analysis on the dataset.

functions.name: eda_module.eda.visualize_categorical
documentation: Visualize categorical variables using bar plots.

functions.name: eda_module.eda.bivariate_analysis
documentation: Perform bivariate analysis between features and a target variable.

functions.name: eda_module.eda.correlation_heatmap
documentation: Plot a heatmap of the correlations.

functions.name: eda_module.eda.detect_outliers
documentation: Detect and visualize outliers using boxplots.
